format.description: Report format: brief, full, or memo

description: Format findings as a structured report or memo, then deliver as a Word document (.docx) — reads workspace research, applies lens concern self-assessment, writes evidence JSON to disk, and produces a downloadable professional document. The full pipeline: evidence trail + formatted deliverable.
usage: write a report, create a memo, format as report, structured writeup, document as report, write something professional, put together a document, write up the findings, make a doc, word document, professional document
